name: Grade 9 Geography — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 9 pathway for regional case studies, sustainability, policy, and geographic research. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 9 knowledge and transferable skills in regional case studies, sustainability, policy, and geographic research.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
